# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Apply the normal safe infra workflow where no abyss-specific local adaptation is needed because the base skill already names everything required.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
No `abyss-*` repo adaptation is needed, so the overlay would only restate the base workflow without adding a real local operational surface.
## Expected object
A deflection that says the base `aoa-safe-infra-change` skill is already sufficient and the abyss overlay would add no real local surface.
## Boundary notes
Do not force the overlay when the base skill already covers the repo shape cleanly.
## Verification hooks
The response should decline the overlay and point back to the base skill rather than inventing extra local steps.
